import requests
from sqlalchemy import create_engine


class UserService:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        self.connection = self.engine.connect()
        self.users = self.connection.execute("SELECT * FROM users").fetchall()
        self.user_map = {u["id"]: u for u in self.users}


class DataPipeline:
    def __init__(self, source_url):
        self.session = requests.Session()
        response = self.session.get(source_url)
        self.raw_data = response.json()
        self.processed = self._process(self.raw_data)
        self.index = {item["key"]: item for item in self.processed}

    def _process(self, data):
        return [self._transform(item) for item in data]


class CacheManager:
    def __init__(self, redis_url):
        import redis
        self.client = redis.from_url(redis_url)
        self.stats = {"hits": 0, "misses": 0}
        self.warm_cache()
